body:
This PR adds a package extension which includes convenience constructors for RRTMGPParameters when CLIMAParameters is loaded.

The constructors are:
- `RRTMGPParameters(FT, overrides = NamedTuple())`
- `RRTMGPParameters(toml_dict, overrides = NamedTuple())`

The overrides are only provided for testing.

The core changes are in ext/CreateParametersExt.jl and Project.toml, but I have updated all of the tests to work with the new constructors.

Package extensions require Julia 1.9+, so for backwards compatibility CLIMAParameters will need to be a dependency or we will need to use Requires.jl

This PR also updates to the latest version of CLIMAParameters and uses the new parameter retrieval system.

I am also not sure if I should update the `examples` Manifest.toml
title: Add RRTMGPParameters constructor package extension

body: A quick update after I forgot to add the changes in #425
title: Update examples/Manifest.toml
